revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Floruit]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2729 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia6]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Fixing the bad interwiki on a template
Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects F]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Floruit here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{sortable|}}} |{{{1|}}} }}{{#if:{{{i|}}} |'' }}{{#switch:{{{lk|}}} |no|off = fl. |yes|on = [[:en:Floruit|fl.]] |abbr |#default = {{Abbr|fl.|floruit ('flourished' – known to have been active at a particular time or during a particular period)}} }}{{#if:{{{i|}}} |'' }}{{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{{1}}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}} | – {{Abbr|c.|circa}} {{{2}}} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] \n \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
